name: uxpreflight
description: Open-source design governance engine for AI-generated frontend applications.

scripts.ux: npm run build:core && npm run build:rule-packs && npm run build:adapters && tsx packages/cli/src/index.ts
scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:rule-packs && npm run build:adapters && npm run build -w @uxpreflight/checker && npm run build -w @uxpreflight/mcp-server && npm run build:cli
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && npm run build:rule-packs && npm run build:adapters && npm run dev -w @uxpreflight/cli
scripts.doctor: npm run build:core && npm run build:rule-packs && npm run build:adapters && npm run doctor -w @uxpreflight/cli
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/rule-packs packages/adapters packages/cli packages/checker packages/mcp-server
